arts.ttl: 'It's difficult' Hull City striker Chris Bedia facing up to Championship challenge
arts.sum: Hull City striker Chris Bedia says he developed a good feeling after conversations with head coach Tim Walter prior to his move to the MKM Stadium. "Because my manager (Walter) knew the coach (Bo Svensson in Berlin) and though I had different options, sometimes you speak with someone and you have the feeling and you say it's better that you go there and it was my decision to come here.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsey only includes FIVE Arsenal players in his best XI of former team-mates, with Cristiano Ronaldo, Gareth Bale and Mesut Ozil all making the cut
arts.sum: Aaron Ramsey, who plays in the Championship with boyhood club Cardiff City, has enjoyed a glittering career at several top clubs across Europe including Arsenal and Juventus.

arts.ttl: Football fans rip into Aaron Ramsey's 'boring' cameo on Sky Sports after former Arsenal star made his presenting debut during Nottingham Forest's win over Crystal Palace
arts.sum: The former Arsenal star took centre stage for Sky Sports' Monday Night Football programme which showcased the evening match between Crystal Palace and Nottingham Forest.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsey gives honest thoughts on INEOS after working with Man Utd owners
arts.sum: INEOS became involved at Manchester United in February following Sir Jim Ratcliffe's £1.3billion deal to acquire a minority stake in the club, but fans haven't witnessed progress this season

arts.ttl: Sir Jim Ratcliffe and INEOS will do an 'unbelievable job' at transforming Man United, says Aaron Ramsey as he offers insight having played for sister club Nice
arts.sum: Ramsey, formerly of Nice, part of INEOS' multi-club network, made the prediction after spending time with figures at the top of the company.
